description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by a white picket fence and lush landscaping, including mature trees, shrubs, and a manicured lawn. The exterior walls are covered in green ivy or foliage, giving the house a natural, eco-friendly appearance. Large, rectangular windows dominate the facade, allowing ample natural light into the open-plan interior, which features visible living, dining, and kitchen areas. The backyard includes a swimming pool with lounge chairs and a small patio area, while the front yard has a children's playset and additional garden features. The roof is flat and partially accessible, with skylights and solar panels visible. The main entryway is centrally located, featuring a simple door with steps leading up to it and flanked by large windows.
description: A modern, ivy-clad single-story house with large windows, a flat roof, and landscaped yard featuring a pool and playset. The design emphasizes open-plan living and eco-friendly elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, picket fence, and a playset under a tree in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swimming pool, lounge chairs, and extensive window coverage along the house's side.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the pool, patio area, and a large tree providing shade in the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the playset, garden beds, and the continuous ivy-covered exterior.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a simple door, steps, no porch, flanked by large windows and minimal decorative elements
